titleStmt.title: SII 27.242: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 242. (A.R. No. 526 of 1928-29.) VARĀṄGA, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the front verandah of the Nēmīśvara-basti.

The earlier part of this undated record, in characters of about the 14th century, contains an eulogy of Jaina preceptors, Maladhāridēva, Mādhavachandra, Prabhāchandra, and Nēmichandra of Mūla-saṁgha, Konḍakund-ānvaya, and Krānūr-gaṇa. The latter part gives the genealogy of the Aḷuvas from Pāṇḍya-paṭṭiyoḍeya, his son Kaviyāḷu, his son Kulaśekharāḷuva, who had three sons Nūrmaḍi-chakravarti, Vīra-bhūpāḷa and Kuṇḍaṇa alias Paṇḍita-Pāṇḍya. It states that Jākalamādēvi, wife of Kulaśēkharāḷuva had a tank built at Varāṅga.
The record announces a gift of land earlier made by a person called Varāṅga, by Kuṇḍaṇa. The record is composed in Kannaḍa verse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī matpavitramakaḷaṁka manaṁta kalpaṁ sakaḷamaṁgaḷamāditīrthaṁ nityōtsavaṁ maṇimaya ni
layaṁ traiḷōkya bhūṣaṇamahaṁ śaraṇaṁ prapadyē śrīcaṁdraṁ sakaḷavaca śrī caṁ
draṁ dānadharmmamutpaḷa caṁdraṁ mācaṁdratāra bhūcakra tīrtha jaḷadhiya caṁdraṁ
tilā pramā dēvasvamapēkṣatē rttatē yāvaccaṁdra divākarau . ©
śrīmatparama gaṁbhīra syādvādāmōgha lāṁchanaṁ jīyā traiḷōkyanātha
sya sāśanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . maḻadumadōrme laukikada vā
rtte nāḍaḍaketa bāgilaṁ teṟiyada bhānuvastamitavādaḍe pōgadanoyya
normmeyuṁ tolgeseda kukkuṭausanake sōlada gaṇḍavimukta virtthiyaṁ . maṟeyada
ghōraduddhara tapaścaraṇaṁ maladhāridēvara . muniyo jaṁgama jēra biṁbananavanya
cārane jainaśāsanarakṣāmaṇi śāntane sakaḷa rāga dvēṣa dōṣa prabhaṁjana nurvvīnu
tane guṇapraṇayi tāneṁbivaṁ viśvamēdiniyoḷa mādhavacaṁdradēva nenedaṁ cāritra cakrēśvaraṁ .
jinamatalakṣīgabhyudayamādudu bhavya janānurāgavattanage viśuddhamārgga maḷava
ṭṭudu satyatapōnidhāna naṁddanavanarāji pallavisutirddudu mādhava caṁdradēvanaṁ
banupama yōgi puṭṭuvudu �mo vasudhāvaḷayāṁtarāḷadoḷu navavibhatiḷakāntaṁ mā
dhava samayamadoṁde kālamesevudu lōka prabhāsiyenisidī mādhava saṁmayaṁ satamesevudidu citratamaṁ .
parasamayādrigevajraṁ birudaṁ mārmmaleva vāri kōḷāhaḷanūrvvarigadhi kaṁ traividyābharaṇaṁ vibhudārjjitaṁ prabhācaṁdra bu
dhaṁ . beṭṭada dāvanaṁdi munirāja gajēṁdravapobca ṣaḍamaṁ meṭṭi kaṣāya dāna jaḷavaṁtōṟe pūjita śiḷādānavaṁ baṭṭivanōjaneṁba parikā
ṟananuddhavana kaḷalci beṁgaṭṭi vimōhameṁba toḍaraṁ paṟidikkidu datyapūrvvadiṁ sitanagāvāriṇige munidēkavaraṁ sārddhattunisenaneṁbī nite
niyoḷirddudakke toreya baṁdēḻiyuṁ Āḷvanāḍane dōṣakaraneṁbu doṁdu pesareṁbiṁniṁdaveṁ biṭṭude municūḍāmaṇi nēmicaṁ
dra ninagaṁ caṁdraṁgaṁ vēnuṁtavaṁ . śatamukhapati vinamita jinapati nuraduvavirata nakhiḷa bhuvanāvāsa sthita viśadakīrtti kāntāpati yatipati
munīṁdra siddhāṁtēśaṁ . śrīmūlasaṁga janita kānūrggaṇa viditamēṣa pāṣāṇāṁ kānūna gacchavitaraścāru śrīcaṁdrayatipa
ti bhbhūvaḷaye . layamūrtti koṁḍakuṁdānvaya śrīmatkrānūrgga ṇāgragaṇyaṁ śrī caṁdra ya miṁdra nesedaṁ sāṁdrayaśōvali vijṛṁ
bhitāśāvaḷeyaṁ . mattājagatprasiddha mūlasaṁgha koṁḍakuṁdānvaya krānūrggaṇa mēṣapāśāṇa gacchā cchakā koṭa
prati baddhavādi saṁsiddhavappa . jagavi ta varāṁgada jainagṛhamaṁ bāgilu goṭṭageya punaccṛtaṁ māḍi
guṇi śrī caṁdrayōgi jasamaṁ paḍedaṁ . kuruḷikuṁda varāṁgadale mūla basadigaḷu kōṭikūṭada saṁbadha
svasti samasta bhuvanavikhyāta pāṁḍyarājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka śaraṇāgata vajrapaṁjara . ri
purāya kaṁjakuṁjara . sāhityāmara nārī manō rāma . saṁgrāmabhīma caturvidha budhajanavana[®vāḷinī]
vi rājahaṁsa . bhāratīkarṇāvataṁsa . paṁḍita pāṁḍya . pāṁḍya dhanaṁjaya . jayāṁganōttuṁgastanāliṁgana pra
saṁga . saṁgara raṁga kēḷī vi ḷa . lōḷalōcanābaḷājana manaḥ kusumasara . sarasvatī karṇna kuṁḍaḷā bha
raṇa . raṇaraṁga sūdraka Ityādi nāmōpēta sōmavaṁśadoḷanēka siṁhāsanānaṁtaraṁ diṁgaṁtta rā
taḷa miḷitakīrti kīrtti paṭṭeyoḍeyaṁ duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipālanāparanāgi rāja rakṣitaṁ dharmameṁba naḍi
yaṁkaṁ naḍisi dharmavaṁ saddharmadiṁ rakṣisida nalliṁbaḷiyi pāṁḍyapaṭṭeyoḍeyaṁ rājyaṁgeyalliṁ
baḷike kaviyāḷu dēvara rājyānaṁttaraṁ nijakula kulaśēkhara nenisida kulaśēkhāḷuvaṁ sukha
saṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire . Ā kulaśēkharāḷuvara sati jākalamādēvi rāṇīmukhada
rppaṇa yasvīkṛte varāṁgadalli taṭākamu maṁdharmmamaṁ karaṁ prakaṭisidaḷ . Alliṁbaḷiyaṁ paṭṭe yo
ḍeya kulaśēkhara dēvarājyanaṁtaraṁ rāyagajāṁkuśaṁ nirmaḍidarājaṁ nūrmmaḍi cakravartti
dānaciṁtāmaṇi catussamudrāmudrita kīttikāntāmanōvallabhanenisi . Abhayava naṁjabā maṟe
vokkari gaṁjadarāti bhūbhujarggabhibha maṁbudhāḷi gabhivācisidartthamanittu bhūtaḷakabhinava vārirā
śi harikalpakujāta phalaṁ boloppuvaṁ tribhuvana śāntara kṣitibhujaṁ ripurāyagajāṁkuśānvayaṁ
Aṁtu tribhuvanabhava daravarttitātthisārttha hridaya saṁtappaṇa karaṇakāraṇa rappudaṟiṁ tribhuvana dā
tāraneṁba svartthasaṁjñeyatāḷdi ripurāyaratoḷdi dharmmavapāḷisi rājyalakṣmiyaṁ . yōḷisirā
jyaṁgeyyuttiralā mahībhūbhuja nijānu jana pākādāraśauryōdāra vīra bhūpā
ḷaniṁ kiṟiyanappa kuṁḍanakṣōṇipāḷa nakhiḷadikpāḷa niḷayamaṁ nijakīrttiyiṁ dhavaḷisi
jagatprasiddha vidyāviḷāsini svarṇna karṇnakuṁḍalābharaṇa nappudaṟiṁ paṁḍitapāṁḍyanenisi pāṁḍya dha
naṁjaya nappudaṟiṁ bhayarakṣakanāgi vēḷuvakāraṇadiṁ tannāḷvadēśadoḷe munnaṁ varāṁganeṁ
ba mahāpuruṣaṁ dharmmamaṁ māḍi nāḍēḷbaḷiyaṁ karedu kaiveḍegoṭṭadanaṁtappa dharmmamaṁ sudharmmadiṁ
kuṁḍaṇōrvvīśvaraṁ rakṣisi prakaṭībhōtaṁ māḍidanā dharmmada sīmā samma(ṁba)ṁdhavāvudeṁda
ḍe mūḍalu baḍaniko teṁkalu niḍuguṁḍigāgi baṁda paḷḷavā paḷḷave mēre paḍuvaluṁ baḍa
galuṁ Ā paḷḷadiṁ porage dēvasvamu haṭivaḷanuṁ miṁtī dharmmamaṁ dēśādhīśvaranuṁ Ēḷubaḷiyuṁ
rakṣīsuvarī dharmmagapāyavaṁ ciṁtisidaṁge paṁcamahāpātakaṁ gaṁgātīradalu sahasra
kapileyaṁ sahasra brahmaṇaraṁ koṁdanitu pāpaṁ pordduguṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō ha
rētu vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyō
pālanīyōbhavadbhiḥ sarvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā nbhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahubhivvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ
yasya yasya yadābhūmi stasyatasya tadāphalaṁ
damaged; contain imprecatory refers.
Digital edition of SII 27.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
